steps.title: Set up vertex form using the given vertex and initial height
steps.content:
We're given the vertex (maximum point) at $(8, 1034)$ and the initial height at $t = 0$ is $10$ feet. In vertex form, $h(t) = a(t - h)^2 + k$ where $(h, k) = (8, 1034)$:

$$h(t) = a(t - 8)^2 + 1034$$

Use the initial condition $h(0) = 10$:

$$10 = a(0 - 8)^2 + 1034$$
$$10 = 64a + 1034$$
$$-1024 = 64a$$
$$a = -16$$

The complete model is:

$$h(t) = -16(t - 8)^2 + 1034$$

steps.title: Find the height at t = 10 seconds
